_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Acquisition of SaharaNutri CJSC (CR 7010009001-FIC) by Najd Holdings CJSC (CR 1018801200-FIC), Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
Structure and Consideration: 80% share purchase for SAR 220,000,000 with SAR 70,000,000 deferred earn-out tied to FY27 EBITDA; financing via Shari’a-compliant murabaha facility and seller note.

Confidentiality/MNPI: Non-public revenue guidance, customer pipeline, and audit adjustments for FY26–27 (Project Dunes) to be shared only in a controlled VDR; recipients acknowledge handling of MNPI under applicable market-conduct rules.
Issuer Workflows: Maintain insider lists and pre-clearance logs; enforce blackout windows; market-conduct follow-up testing to be documented with Compliance and escalated for any breach indicators.

Financing Terms: Murabaha provider to be Crescent Islamic Finance Co. (license LN-2201-FIC) with profit rate pegged to SAIBOR equivalent; any guidance uplift assumptions remain non-public until post-closing disclosure.
Do not circulate national ID/Iqama or CR copies by email

Mr. Sami Al-Qudsi (CFO, Najd Holdings CJSC), DOB 1983-07-12 (age 42), Iqama IQ-8842317592-FIC, office at Dahna Commercial Park, Tower Aurek, Riyadh 12455-FIC, uses device “Najd-iPhone14” SN NHD-1422, finance session STS-RYD-2026-0615-09:30, and treasury subaccount ALF-TR-0083 (ending 4421)
populate VDR fields with masked IDs
